note: Super League (英国ラグビーリーグ) 2026シーズン。NRL rules準拠。PD/G L1指標。

summary.note: 2026-04-19 SL-002 Warrington MISS -1.0u 更新後。Phase2 Basic Tier 運用中の初期実績。1/2 50% -0.77u。

games.prediction_basis: PD/G差 Leeds +14.00 vs Huddersfield -6.29 (diff 20.29 > threshold 12). 2位 vs 11位。
games.note: Leeds 56-22 Huddersfield HIT (+0.23u). Brodie Croft 4 tries. Brad Arthur 50th match in charge celebration. 10 tries total. Away overwhelming victory. 確認ソース: seriousaboutrl.com直接記事 + Sofascore summary.
games.outcome_note: 56-22 blowout。Leeds dominant away win。10 tries、Croft 4 tries。予測HIT。L1差20.3ptが結果に直結。

adjustments.catalans_france_home: -5% (ペルピニャン・フランス開催: 長距離移動の相手チーム不利)
adjustments.injury_penalty: -2% (Luke Yates OUT (neck). Tanginoa RETURNED from groin injury, included in 21-man squad per Yahoo Sports 2026-04-17)

games.translation_note: JSON上は「バルサドラゴンズ vs ウェリントンウルフス」。バルサドラゴンズ=Catalans Dragons、ウェリントンウルフス=Warrington Wolves（Wellington誤訳）と特定。
games.note: Warrington Wolves リーグ1位（PD/G +21.17）。Catalans Dragons 6位でPDマイナス。差23.9ptで圧倒的。Catalans仏国ホームは-5%考慮済み。それでもEV+40.3%は非常に高い。lineup未確認 → 試合前スクワッド要確認。
games.squad_note: 2026-04-17 UPDATE (GEN003): Tanginoa RETURNED (groin recovered) per Yahoo Sports + seriousaboutrl. Luke Yates STILL OUT (neck). Net injury penalty reduced from -5% to -2%. Confidence 80 -> 83.
games.odds_update_note: 2026-04-17: @1.65 -> @1.64. Confidence 85->80->83 after Tanginoa return. EV 32%->31.2%->36.1%. GO tier maintained.
games.outcome_note: Catalans 38-22 Warrington UPSET (Catalans home). Lewis Dodd's first Super League hat-trick. Warrington led 16-10 just after halftime but Catalans ran in five unanswered tries in the second half. Warrington missed chance to go joint-top.
games.miss_analysis: Catalans仏国ホーム補正-5%では不足。ペルピニャンの天候・観客・芝質の累積的優位が Catalans 2ndハーフ5トライ連取を生み出した。Warrington 1st halfでリードしていた（16-10）のに後半で崩壊 = 単なる『移動疲労』以上の構造的 away disadvantage。Superleague Basic Tier では 仏国ホーム補正を -7〜-10% に強化検討。また、Lewis Dodd は2026 breakout year で過去の PD/G 平均値を既に超えている選手（Catalans の実質 PD は直近で改善）。過去7試合平均では PD/G 差23.88ptの妥当性に疑問。
games.rule_candidate_sl_catalans_home: P016 候補: Super League Catalans仏国ホームでは standard -5% が不足 → -7〜-10% 補正検討。証拠 A020 として記録。

games.prediction_basis: PD/G near-even (+0.37). Market YORK implied 66.0% vig-adj. YORK home +3% -> 69%. EV -3.4%. SKIP.
games.notes: L1 neutral - both teams PD/G ~-10. Market-driven fav on home advantage only.
games.outcome_note: York HIT (skip tier, no-bet). Scott Galeano hat-trick. dominance at LNER Community Stadium.
verification_sources: skysports.com Galeano hat-trick York beat Toulouse

games.prediction_basis: PD/G near-even (+0.12). Market LEI implied 73.0% vig-adj. LEI home +3% -> 76%. EV -5.8%. SKIP.
games.notes: Both teams sub-.500 PD/G near equal. Leigh R8 loss to Leeds 56-22. Huddersfield bottom-3 struggle continues.
games.outcome_note: Leigh HIT (skip tier). Josh Charnley 400th appearance + 2 tries. AJ Towse 2 tries + Senior 1 + Lam penalty try.
verification_sources: skysports.com Super League Leigh win Huddersfield

games.prediction_basis: PD/G diff +6.48 (under NRL 6pt threshold, marginal edge). Market WAR 53.5% vig-adj. WAR home +3% + L1 edge +3% = 60%. EV +3.2%. SKIP.
games.notes: Top-of-table clash. WAR recent upset of Catalans 38-22 R8. WIG 5-3. Even matchup with WAR micro edge only.

games.prediction_basis: PD/G diff -6.25 (HFC edge). Market HFC 55.9% vig-adj. CAS home +3%, HFC road -3% = net -6% HFC. L1 HFC +6.25 +4% -> HFC 54%. EV HFC -10.9%. SKIP.
games.notes: Road-home tension. HFC PD/G better but Castleford home crowd factor close.

games.prediction_basis: PD/G diff +16.88 dominant. Market LEE 78.7% vig-adj. LEE home +3, L1 dominance +3, Catalans long travel UK -3 (net +9) -> LEE conf ~88% capped at 85. EV +1.15%. Q3 output_a (conf>=85 AND EV>=0 regardless of threshold).
games.notes: Leeds R8 crushed Huddersfield 56-22. Catalans R8 upset Warrington 38-22 (tier:go miss). Leeds PD/G league-best +16.50. Catalans long-haul UK trip disadvantage.

games.prediction_basis: Odds HKR @1.00 is data entry error (impossible). PD/G diff -14.56 HKR strong. Best estimate conf 85% HKR but EV not computable.
games.notes: Data integrity flag: HKR odds 1.00 in source JSON. Proceed with prediction only, EV pending re-verified odds.

games.prediction_basis: L1 Wakefield has HIGHER PD/G (+10.38 vs STH +2.50) - MARKET ANOMALY. Market STH 73.5% vig-adj. STH home +3%, but L1 contradicts +5% Wakefield weight -> STH conf 72%. EV STH -5.7%. Q4_upset_watch: UF2 + div 47pp but UF<3 so not UPSET_PICK.
games.notes: Interesting market anomaly. WAK 6-2 PD/G +10.38 vs STH 6-2 PD/G +2.50. Market prices STH strong fav on brand/home but PD/G favors WAK. Classic Q4 upset candidate. If Wakefield wins -> evidence for 'market PD/G anomaly' rule.

skipped.reason: L1差26.7pt通過も @1.06 EV計算不可（確信度98%でEV+3.9%止まり）

screening_log.notable: Super League初回スクリーニング。Warrington Wolves (PD/G +21.17) とLeeds Rhinos (+14.00) が突出。GO2件: Leeds @1.32 (EV+14.8%) / Warrington @1.65 (EV+40.3%)。

screening_log.note: SL R9 7 games L1(PD/G) + 4-quadrant. GO 0. Q3 output_a: Leeds vs Catalans (conf 85 PD/G +16.88 dominant). Q4 upset_watch: St Helens vs Wakefield (L1 reverses market, UF2 div47pp but UF<3 no UPSET_PICK). Data error: Bradford vs Hull KR HKR odds 1.00 impossible.
